title: zereth #2239
definition:
1) span
    1a) a unit of measure, approx half-cubit, or the distance from the
        thumb to the little finger on an outstretched hand
nasbUsage:

    1a) a unit of measure, approx half-cubit, or the distance from the
        thumb to the little finger on an outstretched hand

    NASB:  a span
